subcodes.first_line: O Herald of the Covenant! The letter that thou didst write from Chapra Saran to one of the friends was perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان نامه ای که از چهپره سارن مرقوم بیکی از احباب نمودی ملاحظه شد
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @growth of the Cause, @spiritual transformation, @power; influence of a single soul in teaching the Cause, @praise and encouragement
